title: [CI Daily Report] CI Daily Health Report — 2026-03-05
body:
## 🔍 Executive Summary

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total Workflows | 18 (17 active, 1 disabled) |
| Runs (last 24 h) | 4 |
| Success Rate (24 h) | 75% (3 success, 1 in-progress) |
| Failed Runs (last 7 d) | 32 across 4 workflows |
| Overall Health | 🔴 **Critical** |

> **Critical finding**: 4 workflows are in a state of 100% consecutive failure over the past 7 days, all related to Azure infrastructure access (AKS/ACR) and an expired workflow stop-time.

---

## ✅ Workflow Status (Last 7 Days)

| Workflow | Runs | ✅ Success | ❌ Failed | ⚠️ Cancelled | Last Status |
|----------|------|------------|-----------|--------------|-------------|
| Application Deployment to AKS | 8 | 0 | 8 | 0 | ❌ failure |
| Build and Deploy Server to AKS | 8 | 0 | 8 | 0 | ❌ failure |
| Build and Deploy Client to AKS | 7 | 0 | 7 | 0 | ❌ failure |
| Update Docs | 9 | 0 | 9 | 0 | ❌ failure |
| CI Issue Trigger — Deployment Failure Investigator | 16 | 8 | 0 | 8 | ✅ success |
| End-to-End Tests | 16 | 16 | 0 | 0 | ✅ success |
| Run tests | 17 | 17 | 0 | 0 | ✅ success |
| CI Daily Report | 3 | 2 | 0 | 0 | 🔄 in-progress |
| Weekly Research | 1 | 1 | 0 | 0 | ✅ success |
| Copilot Setup Steps | 0 | — | — | — | ⏸ no recent runs |
| Container Build and Scan | 0 | — | — | — | ⏸ no recent runs |
| Infrastructure Deployment | 0 | — | — | — | ⏸ no recent runs |
| Issue Triage | 0 | — | — | — | ⏸ event-driven |
| Daily Test Coverage Improver | 0 | — | — | — | 🚫 disabled |

---

## 🚨 Failure Investigations

### 1. Application Deployment to AKS — 8 consecutive failures
- **Run URL**: https://github.com/sombaner/tailspin-toystore/actions/runs/22663777945
- **Triggered by**: `push` to `main`
- **Failed job**: `Deploy to AKS`
- **Failed step**: `Get AKS and ACR Details`
- **Error**: `az aks list --resource-group rg-sb-aks-01` fails — Azure OIDC authentication failing or AKS cluster does not exist in the expected resource group.
- **Classification**: 🏗️ Infrastructure / ⚙️ Configuration
- **Recommended actions**:
  1. Verify `AZURE_CLIENT_ID`, `AZURE_TENANT_ID`, and `AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID` secrets are configured in repository Settings → Secrets.
  2. Confirm the AKS cluster exists in resource group `rg-sb-aks-01` by running `az aks list --resource-group rg-sb-aks-01`.
  3. Verify the OIDC federated identity credential is configured for the `main` branch.

---

### 2. Build and Deploy Server to AKS — 8 consecutive failures
- **Run URL**: https://github.com/sombaner/tailspin-toystore/actions/runs/22663777970
- **Triggered by**: `push` to `main` (server path change)
- **Failed job**: `deploy-server`
- **Failed step**: `Create namespace if not exists`
- **Error**: `kubectl apply -f render/namespace.yaml` fails — no valid kubeconfig; AKS credentials were not established because the preceding Azure login step fails.
- **Classification**: 🏗️ Infrastructure / ⚙️ Configuration
- **Recommended actions**: Same as #1 above — fix Azure OIDC auth. The build job succeeds (image pushed to ACR), only deployment fails.

---

### 3. Build and Deploy Client to AKS — 7 consecutive failures
- **Run URL**: https://github.com/sombaner/tailspin-toystore/actions/runs/22663777964
- **Triggered by**: `push` to `main` (client path change)
- **Failed job**: `deploy-client`
- **Failed step**: `Create namespace if not exists`
- **Error**: Same kubectl/AKS auth failure as server deploy.
- **Classification**: 🏗️ Infrastructure / ⚙️ Configuration
- **Recommended actions**: Same as #1 above. Note: Docker build and push to ACR succeeds — only the AKS deploy stage is broken.

---

### 4. Update Docs — 9 consecutive failures (since ~Oct 2025)
- **Run URL**: https://github.com/sombaner/tailspin-toystore/actions/runs/22663777965
- **Triggered by**: `push` to `main`
- **Failed job**: `update-docs`
- **Failed step**: `Safety checks`
- **Error**: The workflow contains a hardcoded `STOP_TIME="2025-10-03 08:23:44"`. The safety-check script compares the current date against this stop-time and exits non-zero when the deadline has passed. **This workflow has been permanently blocked since October 3, 2025.**
- **Classification**: ⚙️ Configuration
- **Recommended actions**:
  1. Update `STOP_TIME` to a future date in `.github/workflows/update-docs.lock.yml`.
  2. If the workflow is no longer needed, disable or delete it to prevent alert noise.
  3. Consider removing hardcoded date-based stop logic in favour of a workflow `schedule` or manual disable.

---

## 📈 Trend Analysis

- **Recurring failures**: All 4 failing workflows have failed on **every single run** over the past 7 days — there are no transient (flaky) failures. These are hard infrastructure/configuration blockers.
- **Most stable workflows**: `Run tests` (17/17, 100%), `End-to-End Tests` (16/16, 100%) — application-level CI is healthy.
- **Most unstable workflows**: `Application Deployment to AKS`, `Build and Deploy Server to AKS`, `Build and Deploy Client to AKS` (0% success rate).
- **Notable regression**: Deployment pipelines appear to have been broken for at least the full 7-day window, possibly longer. The `Update Docs` failure has persisted since at least October 2025.
- **CI Issue Trigger cancellations**: 8 of 16 runs were cancelled — this is expected behaviour; the workflow triggers only when a deployment failure is detected, so cancellations represent runs where no failure was found.

---

## 🔒 Audit Findings

### 🔴 High Severity

| Finding | Affected Files | Recommendation |
|---------|---------------|----------------|
| **Mutable action version tags** (e.g. `@v1`, `@v4`, `@v6`) instead of pinned SHA | `app-deploy.yml`, `ci-e2e.yml`, `client-deploy-aks.yml`, `copilot-setup-steps.yml`, `docker-build.yml`, `infra-deploy.yml`, `run-tests.yml`, `server-deploy-aks.yml` | Pin all third-party actions to full commit SHAs (e.g. `actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683`) |
| **Expired stop-time in Update Docs** causes permanent workflow failure | `update-docs.lock.yml` | Update `STOP_TIME` value or disable the workflow |

### 🟡 Medium Severity

| Finding | Affected Files | Recommendation |
|---------|---------------|----------------|
| **Missing `timeout-minutes`** at job level | `ci-e2e.yml`, `client-deploy-aks.yml`, `copilot-setup-steps.yml`, `docker-build.yml`, `infra-deploy.yml`, `run-tests.yml`, `server-deploy-aks.yml` | Add `timeout-minutes: 30` (or appropriate value) to all jobs to prevent runaway builds |
| **Manually disabled workflow** with no indication of planned re-enablement | `daily-test-improver.lock.yml` | Document why it's disabled; delete if no longer needed |

### 🟢 Low Severity / Informational

| Finding | Details |
|---------|---------|
| `actions/checkout@v3` in daily-test-improver | Older mutable tag — upgrade to `@v4` or pin to SHA when re-enabling |
| `Copilot Setup Steps`, `Container Build and Scan`, `Infrastructure Deployment` have no runs in 7 days | Event-driven / manual-only — verify they are still needed and configured correctly |

---
